title: iPad (1st generation)
desc: The original iPad wallpaper features deep cosmic starscapes, pioneering a new era of tablet big-screen aesthetics. On the 9.7-inch screen, galaxy and starlight composition presents unprecedented visual impact. As Steve Jobs said at the launch: 'iPad is the intersection of magic and revolution.' This wallpaper became the pioneering work of tablet device aesthetics.

title: iPad 2
desc: iPad 2 wallpaper continues the cosmic theme's grand narrative, presenting more refined visual effects to complement the lighter and thinner body design. Deep blue-black gradients and scattered starlight showcase smooth visual experience powered by the faster A5 chip. This wallpaper reflects Apple's continued exploration of big-screen aesthetics.

title: iPad (3rd generation)
desc: Third-generation iPad wallpaper is custom-made for the revolutionary Retina display, with every pixel carefully calibrated to present ultra-clear visual effects. Delicate color gradients and refined lighting details present breathtaking beauty on the 264ppi screen. This wallpaper marks tablet devices entering the high-definition visual era.

title: iPad (4th generation)
desc: Fourth-generation iPad wallpaper continues Retina era's refined aesthetics, showcasing high-definition big-screen charm through more mature color layers. Soft gradients and delicate lighting effects perfectly complement the Lightning connector era's new design language. This wallpaper embodies Apple's relentless pursuit of visual quality.

title: iPad (5th generation)
desc: Fifth-generation iPad wallpaper features modern iOS's flat aesthetics, with soft color gradients and elegant composition showcasing the affordable iPad's refined positioning. This wallpaper proves Apple's commitment to high-quality visual experience across all price points.

title: iPad (6th generation)
desc: Sixth-generation iPad wallpaper brings entirely new creative aesthetics with Apple Pencil support, with flowing colors and artistic visual expression perfectly echoing the education market positioning. This wallpaper showcases Apple's product philosophy that 'iPad is a canvas for creativity.'

title: iPad (7th generation)
desc: Seventh-generation iPad wallpaper is meticulously designed for the new 10.2-inch size, showcasing rich color layers on a larger visual canvas. Soft gradients and refined lighting effects perfectly complement iPadOS's split-screen multitasking experience. This wallpaper marks standard iPad entering the big-screen era.

title: iPad (8th generation)
desc: Eighth-generation iPad wallpaper continues the classic visual language, featuring warm tones and elegant gradients. A12 Bionic chip's powerful performance enables smoother wallpaper dynamic effects, showcasing Apple's uncompromising attitude toward entry-level product visual quality.

title: iPad (9th generation)
desc: Ninth-generation iPad wallpaper features fresh colors and refined layering, presenting more natural visual effects with True Tone display technology. This wallpaper embodies Apple's design philosophy of 'giving every iPad excellent visual experience.'

title: iPad (10th generation)
desc: Tenth-generation iPad wallpaper marks a major design language revolution, with colorful schemes complementing the new flat-edge design. Bright vibrant colors and modern composition perfectly echo the four body colors. This wallpaper showcases Apple's precise grasp of young user group aesthetic preferences.

title: iPad (11th generation)
desc: Eleventh-generation iPad wallpaper fuses the latest liquid glass design language, showcasing the aesthetic innovation of new iPadOS 26 through flowing translucent layers and refined light effects. This wallpaper is praised by design critics as 'a paradigm that even entry-level iPad can have flagship-level visual experience.'

title: iPad mini (1st generation)
desc: The original iPad mini wallpaper is meticulously designed for the 7.9-inch small screen, presenting rich visual layers on a compact canvas. Refined color gradients and elegant composition showcase Apple's 'small but uncompromising' design philosophy. This wallpaper became the pioneering work of portable tablet aesthetics.

title: iPad mini 2
desc: iPad mini 2 wallpaper is custom-made for Retina display, presenting amazing clarity on the 7.9-inch screen. Delicate colors and refined lighting effects showcase Apple's technical prowess and design pursuit in bringing high-end visual experience to small screens.

title: iPad mini 3
desc: iPad mini 3 wallpaper continues Retina era's refined aesthetics, bringing more complete visual and functional experience with Touch ID. Soft color gradients and elegant composition showcase Apple's consistently high-quality aesthetic standards on portable sizes.

title: iPad mini 4
desc: iPad mini 4 wallpaper builds upon the fully laminated display's advantages, presenting more transparent and bright visual effects. Anti-reflective coating ensures wallpaper colors remain accurate under various lighting, showcasing Apple's design philosophy of balancing display quality and aesthetic expression.

title: iPad mini 5
desc: iPad mini 5 wallpaper presents richer and more authentic color expression with True Tone display and P3 wide color gamut technology. A12 Bionic chip enables smoother dynamic wallpapers, showcasing Apple's relentless effort to pursue ultimate visual experience on portable devices.

title: iPad mini 6
desc: iPad mini 6 wallpaper is meticulously crafted for the new 8.3-inch edge-to-edge display design, with modern colors and composition complementing the revolutionary flat-edge appearance. Liquid Retina display lets every gradient present silky smooth transitions, marking iPad mini series' new design era.

title: iPad mini 7
desc: iPad mini 7 wallpaper features the aesthetic language of the Apple Intelligence era, with soft gradients and intelligent visual elements perfectly fused. This wallpaper showcases Apple's forward-looking vision of bringing AI aesthetics to portable devices, becoming a new benchmark for small-screen flagship aesthetics.

title: iPad Air (1st generation)
desc: The original iPad Air wallpaper features a light and ethereal visual language, perfectly complementing the revolutionary thin and light design. Soft colors and flowing composition symbolize the Air series' 'light as air' product philosophy. As Phil Schiller stated: 'Air is an entirely new realm of iPad design.'

title: iPad Air 2
desc: iPad Air 2 wallpaper is custom-designed for the 6.1mm ultra-thin body, showcasing the ultimate thin and light aesthetic pursuit through refined layering. Fully laminated display lets wallpapers appear to float on the surface, with anti-reflective coating ensuring accurate color rendering in various environments.

title: iPad Air 3
desc: iPad Air 3 wallpaper presents richer and more authentic color expression with the 10.5-inch screen and P3 wide color gamut technology. True Tone display keeps wallpapers natural and comfortable under different lighting, reflecting Apple's detailed care for user experience.

title: iPad Air 4
desc: iPad Air 4 wallpaper marks a major Air series design language revolution, with colorful vibrant schemes complementing the new flat-edge design. 10.9-inch edge-to-edge display lets wallpapers present a larger visual canvas, with five body colors each having exclusive wallpaper designs, showcasing Apple's design philosophy that 'color is personality.'

title: iPad Air 5
desc: iPad Air 5 wallpaper showcases professional-grade visual experience through smoother dynamic effects powered by M1 chip. This wallpaper showcases Apple's product philosophy of perfectly fusing Pro-level performance with Air-level design, becoming a mid-range market aesthetic benchmark.

title: iPad Air 6
desc: iPad Air 6 wallpaper is optimized separately for 11-inch and 13-inch sizes, showcasing M2 chip era's visual aesthetics through richer visual layers. This wallpaper embodies Air series' design philosophy of 'everything just right,' achieving perfect balance between performance and portability.

title: iPad Air 7
desc: iPad Air 7 wallpaper fuses the latest liquid glass design language, showcasing the aesthetic innovation of new iPadOS 26 through flowing translucent layers and refined light effects. This wallpaper is praised by the design community as 'another leap in Air series design aesthetics,' perfectly balancing lightness and refinement.

title: iPad Air 2019
desc: 2019 iPad Air wallpaper features fresh colors and elegant gradients, presenting authentic natural visual effects with True Tone display and P3 wide color gamut. This wallpaper showcases Air series' design philosophy of 'making professional accessible.'

title: iPad Air 2020
desc: 2020 iPad Air wallpaper features colorful vibrant schemes, with five bright color choices giving each iPad unique personality. The new edge-to-edge display design lets wallpapers present greater visual impact, reflecting Apple's precise insight into young user aesthetic preferences.

title: iPad Air 2022
desc: 2022 iPad Air wallpaper features professional-grade visual aesthetics, with M1 chip bringing smoother dynamic effects and richer color expression. This wallpaper showcases Apple's product vision of perfectly fusing professional performance with Air series' lightweight design.

title: iPad Air 2024
desc: 2024 iPad Air wallpaper is meticulously designed for the dual-size lineup, showcasing M2 chip era's visual aesthetics through modern colors and elegant composition. 11-inch and 13-inch versions have targeted visual optimizations, reflecting Apple's deep thinking about different use scenarios.

title: iPad Air 2024 (M2)
desc: 2024 iPad Air with M2 chip wallpaper features professional-grade visual quality, fully leveraging the chip's powerful graphics performance. Smooth dynamic effects and refined color gradients showcase Air series' product positioning moving toward Pro-level experience.

title: iPad Pro (1st generation, 12.9-inch)
desc: The original 12.9-inch iPad Pro wallpaper pioneers a new era of professional-grade tablet aesthetics, presenting stunning visual effects on the massive canvas. Deep tones and refined layering perfectly complement Apple Pencil's professional creative positioning. This wallpaper is praised by designer communities as 'the perfect background for digital canvases.'

title: iPad Pro (1st generation, 9.7-inch)
desc: 9.7-inch iPad Pro wallpaper debuts with True Tone display technology, presenting professional-grade visual experience through more natural authentic colors. True Tone display keeps wallpapers comfortable to view under different lighting, reflecting Apple's attention to eye-friendly design.

title: iPad Pro (2nd generation)
desc: Second-generation iPad Pro wallpaper showcases dynamic visual effects with unprecedented smoothness powered by ProMotion high-refresh display. 120Hz delivers silky experience where every swipe feels like an artistic performance, marking new heights in tablet display technology and aesthetics.

title: iPad Pro (3rd generation)
desc: Third-generation iPad Pro wallpaper is custom-made for edge-to-edge display design, with flat edges and minimal bezels letting wallpapers present greater visual impact. The arrival of Face ID era makes interaction more natural, with wallpaper design accordingly more immersive. This design is considered a milestone in iPad Pro's visual revolution.

title: iPad Pro (4th generation)
desc: Fourth-generation iPad Pro wallpaper echoes augmented reality's new capabilities with more spatially aware visual design powered by LiDAR Scanner. Deep tones and refined lighting effects showcase Apple's visual foresight for future computing forms.

title: iPad Pro (5th generation)
desc: Fifth-generation iPad Pro wallpaper showcases Pro's ultimate positioning through professional-grade visual aesthetics powered by M1 chip's desktop-class performance. Mini-LED XDR display on 12.9-inch version presents amazing contrast and color performance, called 'a visual feast of tablet display technology.'

title: iPad Pro (6th generation)
desc: Sixth-generation iPad Pro wallpaper echoes new features through more interactive visual design powered by M2 chip and Apple Pencil hover. ProMotion adaptive refresh rate combined with XDR display technology lets wallpapers present cinematic visual quality.

title: iPad Pro (7th generation)
desc: Seventh-generation iPad Pro wallpaper is custom-made for the revolutionary ultra-thin OLED display, presenting amazing visual depth on just 5.1mm body. M4 chip's powerful performance enables more refined and smooth dynamic effects, praised by the design community as 'the most stunning tablet visual experience ever.'

title: iPad Pro 2017
desc: 2017 iPad Pro wallpaper builds upon ProMotion high-refresh technology, showcasing silky smooth visual effects. 120Hz refresh rate makes every gradient transition more delicate, marking tablet display technology entering the high-refresh era.

title: iPad Pro 2018
desc: 2018 iPad Pro wallpaper is meticulously crafted for the edge-to-edge revolutionary design, with deep dark tones complementing Liquid Retina display's rounded corners. Face ID introduction lets wallpaper design focus more on full-screen immersion, reflecting Apple's design foresight for future tablet forms.

title: iPad Pro 2020
desc: 2020 iPad Pro wallpaper showcases professional tablet's cutting-edge positioning through visual design with greater spatial awareness and depth powered by LiDAR and AR capabilities. Refined color layers and dynamic lighting perfectly echo augmented reality era's visual needs.

title: iPad Pro 2021
desc: 2021 iPad Pro wallpaper builds upon M1 chip's powerful graphics performance, presenting amazing visual effects powered by mini-LED XDR display. Ultra-high contrast and precise color reproduction let wallpapers appear like art pieces before your eyes. This design is rated as 'a new benchmark for professional-grade visual experience.'

title: iPad Pro 2022
desc: 2022 iPad Pro wallpaper showcases Pro's innovative spirit through more interactive visual design powered by M2 chip and Apple Pencil hover. ProMotion combined with XDR display technology's perfect fusion lets every detail present professional-grade quality.

title: iPad Pro 2024
desc: 2024 iPad Pro wallpaper is custom-made for the new OLED Ultra Retina XDR display, presenting amazing visual depth on history's thinnest iPad body. M4 chip-driven dynamic effects and amazing HDR brightness make wallpapers 'a glowing piece of art,' defining new heights of professional tablet aesthetics.
